exemplar.title: Should some knowledge not be sought on ethical grounds?

detailedExemplarData.title: Should some knowledge not be sought on ethical grounds?

strengths: Clear identification of three distinct real-world objects with contextual details (date, location, purpose).
Explicit linkage of each object to the chosen IA prompt, demonstrating coherent ethical reasoning beyond mere description.
Well-structured bibliography separated from the main text, with labelled entries matching each object discussion.
Use of subsection headers and object labels enhances clarity and navigability of the exhibition.
weaknesses: Citation format is inconsistent (missing accessed dates, broken URLs, varied styles) and requires standardization.
Ethical analysis occasionally remains superficial or repetitive, lacking nuanced counter-arguments and deeper critical engagement.
Some factual inaccuracies (e.g., mislabeling Haberâs Nobel Prize) undermine credibility.
Links to the IA prompt, while coherent, sometimes lack precision, balanced perspectives or integration of a formal ethical framework.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The examinerâs strand assessment places the work solidly in band 5â6, noting that the student fulfills all core requirements: three clearly identified objects with real-world contexts, coherent links to the prompt, and supported justifications. The commentary goes beyond simple description by engaging with ethical dimensions, and citations are provided for all objects. However, the analysis occasionally lacks depth, nuance, balanced counter-arguments and consistent citation standards. These characteristics align with the descriptor for the upper end of band 5â6, warranting a score of 6. Given the single gradable criterion for the TOK Exhibition and the examinerâs confirmed total mark of 6, this score accurately reflects the relative strengths and areas for improvement in the submission.

annotations.comment: The bibliography is clearly structured and separated from the main text, reflecting good organizational skills.
This citation entry lacks a date accessed and follows a different format from others; ensure consistent citation style across entries.
Use a hanging indent and standard APA/MLA conventions for long URLs instead of breaking them mid-line.
The student clearly states the selected IA prompt at the beginning, ensuring focus and coherence in the exhibition.
The introduction sets up the theme but could be strengthened by explicitly stating how each chosen object will address various aspects of the ethical grounds for seeking knowledge.
Object 1 is clearly labeled, ensuring immediate recognition and linking to the subsequent discussion.
Does the student specify this particular imageâs provenance to confirm it represents the specific Hiroshima bomb rather than a generic illustration?
Including more contextâsuch as the exact coordinates or unit that dropped the bombâwould deepen the real-world specificity required by the rubric.
The context is descriptive but the ethical analysis here remains superficial; integrating perspectives on proportionality and civilian impact would add depth.
This concluding sentence repeats the assertion that no knowledge should be hindered; consider introducing counter-examples to avoid oversimplification.
The argument here is one-sided. Integrate a counter-argumentâsuch as the risk of nuclear proliferationâto enhance critical engagement.
Provide specific details (e.g., institution name and publication source) for the image of the CRISPR-edited macaque to anchor it firmly in its real-world context.
The second object is clearly introduced with a precise title and date, aligning well with rubric expectations.
The link between CRISPR research and the prompt is asserted but lacks supporting evidence on public health benefits versus animal welfare concerns.
Embed in-text citations to the OpenMind source when discussing post-war nuclear applications to strengthen evidence integration.
This analysis of animal suffering is valid but overly repetitive; consider condensing and linking each point back explicitly to the promptâs ethical boundary.
Object 3 is clearly labeled, aiding the readerâs navigation and satisfying rubric clarity requirements.
Including the date and origin of Boschâs reactor image in the caption would improve the specificity of real-world context.
The statement that Haber received a âNobel Peace Awardâ is factually incorrect; this undermines credibilityâhe received the Nobel Prize in Chemistry.
Clarify the historical context (e.g., reaction year, location) to satisfy the rubricâs requirement for precise real-world context.
The ethical evaluation relies on general claims; consider applying a specific ethical framework (e.g., utilitarianism vs deontology) for sharper analysis.
Subsection headers for each object in the bibliography help the reader match citations to the corresponding object discussion.
Including the raw URL in a standalone line interrupts flow; instead, embed the link within a full citation entry following IB guidelines.
The student labels each bibliography entry by object number, which aids quick cross-reference.
Add an accessed date and standardize author and date order to align with the IB citation format consistently.
The repetition of âknowledge should be soughtâ weakens impact; vary phrasing or structure to maintain engagement.
While acknowledging military misuse of ammonia, consider discussing regulatory or ethical oversight that guided Haberâs research to balance the argument.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content:
The exhibition presents
three objects, but the
real-world contexts of
these objects are not
stated, or the images
presented may be
highly generic images of
types of object rather
than of specific
real-world objects. Links
between the objects
and the selected IA
prompt are made, but
these are minimal,
tenuous, or it is not
clear what the student is
trying to convey.
There is very little
justification offered for
the inclusion of each
object in the exhibition.
The commentary on the
objects is highly
descriptive or consists
only of unsupported
assertions.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
